_README: CONTRIBUTION POINT 2 of 2 — this encodes your family's standing taste so requests can stay short. Keys starting with _ are ignored by the loader. Fill in the TODOs with REAL values; they are the domain knowledge the code can't guess. The ranker (src/reservation_assistant/ranking.py) reads these.
reservation_name: TODO: the name reservations are held under, e.g. Eric Backman
_price_ceiling_help: 1-4 ($ to $$$$). Soft cap the ranker discourages exceeding. null = no cap.
_min_rating_floor_help: Drop anything below this many stars before ranking. null = keep all.
notes: TODO: free text the assistant can surface, e.g. 'sister prefers quieter rooms, no bar seating, dietary: one pescatarian'
